id_merchant.description: Provided by MiPS. id_merchant is the unique ID to identify the merchant.

id_entity.description: Provided by MiPS. The id entity represents a sub administrative virtual representation of the merchant. It can be a shop, a department, a trade mark or an company of a bigger group, etc. At least if a merchant has only one entity, the id_entity will be a one and only data.

id_operator.description: Provided by MiPS. id_operator is the unique id of a user.

operator_password.description: Provided by MiPS. Together with id_operator, this are the merchant's credentials
